title: The Grand Atrium: Docent Gallery Tours
strategies: 2-D next-fit dispatch baseline: keep loading the current tour until the next group would break EITHER the crowd cap C or the docent-minute budget T, then open a new tour and never look back (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference)
2-D first-fit in arrival order: place each group on the lowest-index tour with room on BOTH axes, reusing earlier gaps but never reordering the queue

decreasing-order best-fit vector packing: sort groups large-first under normalized keys (sum/max of people/C and minutes/T) and place each with a tightest-remaining or dot-product best-fit rule that fills both axes, keeping the fewest-tour layout over all (order, fit) combos

seeded local search / metaheuristics: start from a best-fit-decreasing layout and relocate/swap groups (or run perturb-and-reoptimize restarts) to co-fill both the crowd and docent-minute axes and squeeze out remaining half-empty tours
